name: Discover it® Cash Back

welcome_offer.description: Unlimited Cashback Match: Discover automatically matches all cash back earned at the end of your first year. No minimum spending, no maximum cap.

earning_rates.notes: 5% cash back on rotating bonus categories on up to $1,500 in combined quarterly purchases (requires activation each quarter). 2026 Q1: Grocery stores, wholesale clubs, select streaming services. Q2: Restaurants, home improvement stores.
Earn 1% cash back on all other purchases.

other_benefits.name: Cashback Match
other_benefits.description: Discover matches ALL cash back earned at the end of your first year — effectively doubling your earnings.

other_benefits.name: Free FICO Score
other_benefits.description: Free FICO credit score on your monthly statement.

other_benefits.name: No Annual Fee Forever
other_benefits.description: No annual fee; all rewards are pure upside.

sources.notes: WalletHub - Discover it Cash Back Editor's Review April 2026.
Bankrate - Guide to the 2026 Discover Cash Back Calendar, Dec 2025.

notes: Discover is accepted by 99%+ of US merchants. International acceptance is lower than Visa/Mastercard. The rotating 5% categories require quarterly activation at Discover's website. The Unlimited Cashback Match is the card's standout feature — effectively a 100% bonus match on all first-year earnings.
